{# find_contacts_results.html — Results after AI contact search. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), prospects (list[ProspectContact]), search_count (int), error (str | None — set when the AI web search failed). Called by: vendor_find_contacts_status GET (poller terminal swap) in vendors.py. Depends on: prospect_card.html partial. #} {% if error %}
{{ error }}
{% elif prospects %}

Found Contacts ({{ search_count }} new)

AI search complete
{% for p in prospects %} {% include "htmx/partials/vendors/prospect_card.html" %} {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No contacts found for this vendor.

Try broadening the job title keywords.

{% endif %}
